title: YBCPACK Crystal Whisky Glasses Set of 6, 10oz Whisky Tumbler, Lead-Free Old Fashioned Whiskey Glasses for Scotch, Spirit, Vodka, Gin, Cocktail or Water
features: 【3 distinct designs】This set includes 6 stunning 10oz whiskey glasses featuring 3 distinct, elegant designs (2 of each). From a classic cut to a modern twist, this set offers unparalleled variety and style.
【Perfect Capacity】The 10oz capacity of the old fashioned glass provides ample room for a generous pour of your favorite spirit, large ice spheres, or whiskey stones, without compromising the aroma.

【Premium Material】Each whisky glass is crafted from premium, high-density lead-free crystal, which offers exceptional brilliance and clarity that beautifully showcases the rich colors of your bourbon or scotch.
【Durable & Dishwasher-Safe】These crystal whiskey glasses are crafted for durability and are conveniently dishwasher-safe, making cleanup a breeze. Enjoy premium quality without the high maintenance.

【Gift for Man】 The stylish and functional rocks glass sets is ideal for Father’s Day, birthdays, anniversaries, housewarmings, or as a sophisticated corporate gift, it's a guaranteed way to delight the whiskey lover in your life—be it a dad, husband, friend, or boss.
description: Product Description YBCPACK Whiskey Glasses Set of 6 Stunning Old Fashioned Whisky Glasses Happy Drinking Elevate your whiskey and cocktail experience with this premium set of 6 lead-free crystal whiskey glasses. Perfect Presentation Each old fashioned glass is meticulously crafted to deliver a perfect balance of style, functionality, and durability. 3 Designs The set includes 3 distinct designs, offering versatility for different occasions and preferences. 6 * 10 Oz Whiskey Glasses Lead-Free Crystal: Made from food-grade lead-free glass Dishwasher-Safe: Top-rack dishwasher safe for convenience Enhance Drinking Experience Whether you're enjoying a classic Old Fashioned, a neat whiskey, or a sophisticated cocktail, these glasses enhance the experience with their clarity and elegance. Home Bar Accessories Perfect for home bars, cocktail parties, and intimate gatherings. Gifting This crystal glass set makes a perfect gift for anniversaries, weddings, birthdays, and other special events. Watch the joy on their face as they unwrap this stunning collection.
